raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need find and cp. Use rsync or find. Use find -type f ! -name '*text*' -exec cp --parents {} /system/folder3/backup_dbg/backup \; . Ensure directories. Use mkdir -p. Provide single command. Use bash.
